title: geranium neopumilum
intro: Geranium neopumilum, also known as the dwarf geranium, is a low-growing, flowering plant native to South Africa, characterized by its delicate pink or white flowers and small, rounded leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Geranium neopumilum include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Geranium neopumilum often include teas, tinctures, and infusions made from the plant's leaves and flowers, which can be consumed internally or used topically to promote healing and well-being.
